category_sources: source_facts.description says CDI is a C and Fortran interface for Climate and NWP model data; official CDI overview describes GRIB, netCDF, SERVICE, EXTRA, and IEG support.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdi; official project page title and documentation use CDI / Climate Data Interface.
docs_sources: Official Redmine project wiki links C and Fortran documentation; official embedded documentation page is the CDI C Manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CDI Redmine project exposes files, wiki, and documentation but no public official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official CDI overview identify climate/NWP data, C and Fortran APIs, and supported GRIB/netCDF formats; source_facts.executables lists cdi CLI.
